function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.window_farm_starter_tray
alias: window_farm_starter_tray
purchased_on: 2026-04-14
total_eur: 27
counterparty: Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien
project: Window Farm Notes
related_entity: Oskar Novak
lines:
  - item: self-watering tray
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 19
    line_eur: 19
  - item: herb seed packets
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Herb tray and seed starter order

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                          |
| bill_id        | bill.window_farm_starter_tray |
| alias          | window_farm_starter_tray      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-04-14                    |
| total_eur      | 27                            |
| counterparty   | Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien       |
| project        | Window Farm Notes             |
| related_entity | Oskar Novak                   |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | self-watering tray | 1   | 19       | 19       |
| 2 | herb seed packets  | 1   | 8        | 8        |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL              |     |          | 27       |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Small child-friendly garden experiment that matters mostly because it might stick as a care routine.

function.message: Completed. I processed the oldest inbox message and OCR-structured all bills related to Oskar Novak. I found one related bill and added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving the original body text in place: `50_finance/purchases/2026_04_14__eur_000027__bill__window_farm_starter_tray.md`. Then I deleted the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system workflows/schemas before task work, used lowest inbox filename, preserved original body during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR all bills related to Oskar Novak. Searches across `50_finance/purchases` showed one Oskar-related bill (`related_entity | Oskar Novak`). That file contained all required bill-schema fields and line items, allowing exact frontmatter extraction without guessing. The migration was applied in place with full body preservation, then the processed inbox file was removed per inbox workflow.
